MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

JUDICIAL MEDIATION
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: (405/PATRICK MAHONEY) CLERK: FRANCES YOKOTA REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE #5797

Petitioner present with counsel Michael Freedman and Respondent present with counsel Garry Cohen. Parties had an extensive mediation off the record with Judge P. Mahoney. Parties reached a settlement. Settlement was stated on the record. Counsel for Petitioner, Mr. Freedman will prepare this order.
